title: ARCH_PRESSURE_REPORT
description: Structural pressure test output. All fields must be PASS for the changeset to proceed. Any FAIL field blocks routing. No advisory classification permitted.

work_packet_id.description: References the WORK_PACKET that triggered this pressure test.

changeset_id.description: References the CHANGESET being pressure tested.

cantonal_cardinality.description: Each sub-hub owns exactly 1 CANONICAL + 1 ERROR table. No exceptions.

registry_first.description: All tables exist in ctb.table_registry before creation. No unregistered tables.

id_authority.description: Identity minting occurs at hub level only, governed by registry. No rogue ID generation.

no_sideways_calls.description: No direct hub-to-hub or sub-hub-to-sub-hub data flow. All cross-boundary routing through spokes.

contracts_declared.description: All structural contracts (schema, interface, spoke) are explicitly declared before implementation.
